overall.description: A cinematic scene from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a mohawk sitting on a bench under an orange arched canopy in a futuristic urban plaza. Another character approaches and sits beside them, prompting a camera shift to show both characters as they share the bench in the sunlit cyberpunk environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza with food kiosk

events.description: second character approaches from the right and sits down on the bench

agents.ego_description: sitting on the concrete bench eating from a green container, occasionally looking around the plaza

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking past the food kiosk in the background

entered.detail: large curved orange metal and glass structure providing partial shade over the plaza
small food vendor booth with green and yellow panels and a satellite dish nearby
large satellite dish mounted on a pole near the food kiosk
long concrete bench where the character is seated
tall futuristic skyscrapers and construction cranes visible in the background
green leafy trees lining the left side of the plaza

segments.scene_description: A character with a mohawk and American flag patch sits alone on a concrete bench under an orange arched canopy in a futuristic urban plaza. The scene is bathed in warm midday sunlight filtering through the canopy, with a green and yellow food kiosk visible in the mid-ground and pedestrians occasionally walking through the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian plaza bench with two occupants

events.description: camera shifts from behind first character to over-the-shoulder of second character, then pans to show both seated figures

agents.ego_description: now seated next to the first character, with interaction prompt visible, looking at the companion

notable_agents.action: NPC with mohawk and leather jacket sitting on the bench eating, now companion to the player

segments.scene_description: The camera repositions to show both characters sitting side-by-side on the bench. The second character, wearing a leather vest and cross earring, has joined the first, and they sit together under the orange canopy. The food kiosk is now visible to the right as the camera angle shifts to capture the interaction between the two figures in the sunlit cyberpunk plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a solitary portrait of a character to a shared moment between two figures in a sunlit urban plaza. It begins with a character featuring a mohawk and an American flag patch sitting alone on a concrete bench beneath the warm glow of an orange arched canopy. As the camera repositions, the frame expands to reveal a second character in a leather vest and cross earring joining the first on the bench. The scene then shifts its angle to capture both figures side-by-side, bringing a green and yellow food kiosk into view on the right. This movement concludes by framing the interaction between the two characters as they sit together under the filtered midday light of the cyberpunk environment.
